title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash, a new model that reportedly matches Pro tier performance at lower cost. The video demonstrates eight real-world workflows including multimodal vision, video understanding, contract analysis, code generation, task prioritization, error fixing, JSON parsing, and Workspace integration.
